data.body: Prep complete while plan-reviews run. Codebase map obtained (creation seams + test fixtures). Key seams: create_core (composer.py:73, kw-only params, builds CREATE.data ~:154); create_cli (:194); process_create projection (_processors.py:105, source_* prior-art at :182); _lib_writes create_ticket/idea/create_identity/append_session_log; _mcp_writes create_ticket/create_idea/log_session/create_identity; identity create_identity_core/ensure_identity_for. Test fixture: tests/interfaces/conftest.py::rebar_repo (temp git repo, REBAR_ROOT). Adapters: Library=in-process, CLI=subprocess python -m rebar.cli, MCP=in-process FastMCP call_tool. 6fe2 test file uses -k selectors cli/mcp/python/invalid/legacy. NOTE for impl: gen_types._pytype has NO const handling -> must add const->Literal[True] support for creation_channel_inferred, since gen_types --check is a happy-path gate.
